title: Grid Identity, Coordinates, Geometry, and Units
description: Rows and columns are mixed with pixels, the y-axis is assumed to point upward, resize changes cell identity, and rounding leaves gaps. Learners cumulatively produce typed logical-grid and viewport geometry model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Represent stable row-column identity separately from storage offset, graph vertex, pixel rectangle, and display label.
Convert between row-column, linear index, logical point, and Canvas coordinates with explicit origins and axis direction.
Name cells, pixels, logical units, scale factors, padding, and line widths in every geometry formula.
